+  // Aba Grid

   ),

   TabConfig(
     title: "Regimes Tributários",
     icon: Icons.receipt_long,
     isGrid: true,
-    endpoint: ApiLinks.allEmpresas,

     parentField: "parceiroId",
+    gridFieldConfigs: [

+    ],
   ),
 ];

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
static List<TabConfig> tabConfigs = [
  TabConfig(
    title: "Dados Principais",
    icon: Icons.person,
    fields: [
      FieldConfig(
        label: "Nome",
        fieldName: "nome",
        icon: Icons.person,
        isInForm: true,
        isRequired: true,
      ),
      FieldConfig(
        label: "CPF",
        fieldName: "cpf",
        icon: Icons.badge,
        isInForm: true,
      ),
      FieldConfig(
        label: "E-mail",
        fieldName: "email",
        icon: Icons.email,
        isInForm: true,
      ),
    ],
  ),
  TabConfig(
    title: "Empresas",
    icon: Icons.business,
    isGrid: true,
    endpoint: ApiLinks.empresasByParceiro, // ex: "/api/parceiro/{id}/empresas"
    parentField: "parceiroId",
  ),
  TabConfig(
    title: "Endereços",
    icon: Icons.location_city,
    isGrid: true,
    endpoint: ApiLinks.enderecosByParceiro,
    parentField: "parceiroId",
  ),
  TabConfig(
    title: "Regimes Tributários",
    icon: Icons.receipt_long,
    isGrid: true,
    endpoint: ApiLinks.regimesByParceiro,
    parentField: "parceiroId",
  ),
];
